title: Bind T1 PM verdicts to the exact PR head SHA in Merge Gate (continuation)

sha_binding.verified_source_note: PR #1255 squash/merge-committed to main as c17e1f64e2ae20d7df80e2d4c030c99c6e01bcc6. Rebound from the stale pre-merge implementation SHA (11d1b8cb) to the authoritative merge SHA during post-merge lane-close reconciliation (manifest was missing commit_sha; ops:lane-close --repair-merged flagged repair_required_via_pr). This PR carries the exact, unmodified implementation from PR #1246's PM-approved head 33d1bba3cd1843bce5807f48b8d0a146ce26e156 (.github/workflows/merge-gate.yml and scripts/ops/workflow-hardening.test.ts copied byte-identical via `git checkout 33d1bba3 -- <paths>`). PR #1246 was frozen by Merge Gate's unconditional three-CHANGES_REQUIRED bounce cap despite a later exact-head PM_VERDICT: APPROVED on that same head -- a defect tracked separately as UTV2-1559. This continuation PR was the PM-authorized manual drain path for that frozen state, per PM's 2026-07-19 PM-triage disposition. PR #1246 itself is preserved unchanged as the audit record and was closed as superseded once this continuation was confirmed merged.

continuation_of.freeze_reason: Merge Gate bounce-limit trips unconditionally at 3 authorized CHANGES_REQUIRED verdicts, regardless of a later APPROVED verdict on the same or a later head
continuation_of.pm_triage_disposition_note: PM chat disposition 2026-07-19: 'Create a governed continuation PR... Preserve #1246 unchanged as the audit record... No admin merge or direct-main bypass... Close #1246 as superseded only after the continuation PR exists.'

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact -- a fresh exact-head PM_VERDICT is required for this new PR/head per the standing T1 rule that a head change invalidates prior approval.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: Live smoke run per T1 policy; this PR changes only Merge Gate workflow logic and a test file, no production code path or migration.

queries.description: INSERT via processSubmission — one row per synthetic pick, in the 6 of 7 database-smoke tests that create a pick
INSERT via processSubmission (same 6 tests); UPDATE lifecycle_state via transitionPickLifecycle (queued, posted) and via the settlement RPC path

INSERT on each successful transitionPickLifecycle call and on each successful settlement transition; SELECT COUNT(*) used by three tests to assert zero rows were written for a specific to_state after a rejected atomic operation

INSERT via one successful enqueueDistributionAtomic call; UPDATE status to 'processing' via claimNextAtomic; a separate enqueue attempt is rejected and asserted via findByIdempotencyKey returning null
SELECT COUNT(*) used to assert zero rows were written after a rejected confirmDeliveryAtomic call

INSERT via recordPickSettlement/settlePickAtomic on successful calls; one settlePickAtomic call is rejected and asserted via SELECT COUNT(*) returning zero; SELECT used to assert exactly one base record and that a correction does not mutate the original row
SELECT COUNT(*) used by three tests to assert zero audit rows for a rejected atomic operation, and by one test to assert at least two audit rows exist for a successful settlement plus its correction
read-only SELECT (listByType('player')) scanning the full live table for the duplicate (external_id, sport, participant_type) invariant

acceptance_criteria.continuation_carries_identical_code_no_s: PASS -- .github/workflows/merge-gate.yml and scripts/ops/workflow-hardening.test.ts are byte-identical to PR #1246 approved head 33d1bba3
acceptance_criteria.frozen_pr_1246_preserved_unchanged_as_au: PASS -- no comments edited or deleted on #1246; #1246 to be closed as superseded only after this continuation is confirmed
acceptance_criteria.no_admin_merge_or_direct_main_bypass_use: PASS -- this is a normal PR through the governed merge-gate path

owner_boundary.pm_verdict_v1: not_used_for_this_lane -- merge authority satisfied via t1-approved label per docs/05_operations/OPERATING_MODEL_SONNET5.md merge-authority table
owner_boundary.note: PR #1255 carried the t1-approved label (fresh, bound to this PR/head, not carried forward from #1246) and merged to main as c17e1f64e2ae20d7df80e2d4c030c99c6e01bcc6.

known_gaps: This continuation PR does not itself implement the durable UTV2-1559 fix (a structured pm-triage/v1 mechanism with regression tests). It is the documented manual drain path PM authorized for immediate use while that durable fix is implemented separately.
